name: Skeleton
description: Pulsing placeholder block for loading states.

api.name: Skeleton
api.description: Pulsing placeholder block for loading states.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Screen-reader name for the loading placeholder. Defaults to "Loading"; set a localized string (or pass aria-label directly) so it announces in the app's language.

examples.title: Basic Shapes
examples.code:
<Stack Gap="4">
    <Skeleton Class="h-4 w-[250px]" />
    <Skeleton Class="h-4 w-[200px]" />
    <Skeleton Class="h-4 w-[150px]" />
</Stack>

examples.title: Card Skeleton
examples.code:
<Card>
    <CardHeader>
        <Skeleton Class="h-5 w-[180px]" />
        <Skeleton Class="h-4 w-[250px]" />
    </CardHeader>
    <CardContent>
        <Stack Gap="2">
            <Skeleton Class="h-4 w-full" />
            <Skeleton Class="h-4 w-full" />
            <Skeleton Class="h-4 w-[80%]" />
        </Stack>
    </CardContent>
</Card>

examples.title: Profile Skeleton
examples.code:
<Flex Align="center" Gap="4">
    <Skeleton Class="h-12 w-12 rounded-full" />
    <Stack Gap="2">
        <Skeleton Class="h-4 w-[200px]" />
        <Skeleton Class="h-4 w-[160px]" />
    </Stack>
</Flex>

examples.title: List Skeleton

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Screen-reader name for the loading placeholder. Defaults to "Loading"; set a localized string (or pass aria-label directly) so it announces in the app's language.

mdSummary:
# Skeleton

Pulsing placeholder block for loading states.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Feedback
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/skeleton

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Skeleton | Animation | `SkeletonAnimation` | `SkeletonAnimation.Pulse` |  |
| Skeleton | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Screen-reader name for the loading placeholder. Defaults to "Loading"; set a localized string (or pass aria-label directly) so it announces in the app's language. |
| Skeleton | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Skeleton | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SkeletonCard | Animation | `Skeleton.SkeletonAnimation` | `Skeleton.SkeletonAnimation.Pulse` |  |
| SkeletonCard | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SkeletonCard | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SkeletonCircle | Animation | `Skeleton.SkeletonAnimation` | `Skeleton.SkeletonAnimation.Pulse` |  |
| SkeletonCircle | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Screen-reader name for the loading placeholder. Defaults to "Loading"; set a localized string (or pass aria-label directly) so it announces in the app's language. |
| SkeletonCircle | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SkeletonCircle | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| SkeletonText | Lines | `int` | `3` |  |
| SkeletonText | Animation | `Skeleton.SkeletonAnimation` | `Skeleton.SkeletonAnimation.Pulse` |  |
| SkeletonText | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| SkeletonText | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `SkeletonCard`, `SkeletonCircle`, `SkeletonText`

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Skeleton />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-border`, `--color-primary`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Skeleton/Skeleton.razor`
- `UI/Skeleton/SkeletonCard.razor`
- `UI/Skeleton/SkeletonCircle.razor`
- `UI/Skeleton/SkeletonText.razor`
